title: Describing People 描述外貌
scene: 描述一个新同学的长相和穿着。

lines.en: Mia, did you see the new student in our class today?
lines.zh: Mia，你今天看到班上的新同学了吗？

lines.en: Yes, I noticed him in math class. He is very tall and thin.
lines.zh: 看到了，我在数学课上注意到他了。他又高又瘦。

lines.en: He has short black hair and wears glasses, right?
lines.zh: 他留着黑色短发，戴着眼镜，对吧？

lines.en: That is right! And he has big brown eyes and a friendly smile.
lines.zh: 没错！他还有一双棕色的大眼睛，笑容很友善。

lines.en: He was wearing a blue T-shirt and white sneakers today.
lines.zh: 他今天穿了一件蓝色T恤和白色运动鞋。

lines.en: He looks really smart. I heard he is good at sports too.
lines.zh: 他看起来很聪明。我听说他也很擅长运动。

lines.en: Maybe we can invite him to play soccer with us after school.
lines.zh: 也许我们可以邀请他放学后和我们一起踢足球。

lines.en: Good idea! Let me go talk to him first.
lines.zh: 好主意！让我先去找他聊聊。
